findings.title: VAT/PIN metadata never reaches printed receipt (AC2 broken end-to-end) — fix entangled w/ immutability
Reprints would re-stamp historical receipts with current VAT metadata (immutability) — snapshot at issue
No KRA PIN / VAT-number format validation; optional with no required-when-enabled gate
AC1 Settings->Tax UI does not exist; 3 fields have no UI/test
